title: Extend actor JSON with DID fields
description:
Add DID fields to actor JSON-LD output. Non-DID-aware peers ignore unknown fields.

## Fields to add

1. Add DID context to @context array
2. Add "did" field with did:key (stable identity)
3. Add both DIDs to alsoKnownAs array

## Example output
```json
{
  "@context": [
    "https://www.w3.org/ns/activitystreams",
    "https://w3id.org/security/v1",
    {"did": "https://w3id.org/did#did"}
  ],
  "id": "https://example.com/users/alice",
  "type": "Person",
  "preferredUsername": "alice",
  "publicKey": { ... },
  
  "did": "did:key:z6MkPZ...",
  "alsoKnownAs": [
    "did:key:z6MkPZ...",
    "did:web:example.com:users:alice"
  ]
}
```

## Implementation
- Modify actor serialization to include did field
- Append to existing alsoKnownAs (preserve any existing entries)
- Context extension for "did" term

## Acceptance
- [ ] GET /users/{username} includes did field
- [ ] alsoKnownAs contains both did:key and did:web
- [ ] JSON-LD validates
- [ ] Federation with Mastodon still works
